title: My Heart Will Go On
meaning_summary: My Heart Will Go On still dominates because Titanic made it one of the strongest soundtrack-linked songs in modern pop history.
revenue_drivers: The song remains globally tied to Titanic and soundtrack nostalgia.
Weddings, events, and ballad playlists keep long-tail listening active.
Its cultural familiarity supports unusual catalog durability.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate assumes global soundtrack nostalgia, high recurring ballad demand, and strong event-driven listening.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not publicly modeled as a fully sold-out song position
ownership.notes: Artist-side range is modeled from likely master participation and performance income, not disclosed royalty statements.
